subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — glad to hear Partner Corp sees synergy between our roadmaps. We'd be happy to set up an introductory call this coming week.

Could you let me know which days and time slots work best for you? We have availability on most afternoons (UTC), so I'm sure we can find something that fits.

Regarding the contact directory and direct phone lines — I'm not able to share internal contact details externally, but I can make sure the right people from our side are looped in once we've aligned on scope and timing for the conversation. If a senior technical discussion makes sense as a next step, we'll coordinate that on our end.

Looking forward to getting something on the calendar.

Best regards
